name: update_conversation_state
description: Change the state of a conversation to pending, unresolved, or resolved. Use this to triage and close support tickets.

parameters.name: website_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your Crisp website.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The session identifier for the conversation.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The new conversation state. One of: pending, unresolved, resolved.
